name: Colbor VM2 V Mount Adaptor
description: The COLBOR VM2 includes a V-mount adapter and a D-Tap to Type-C V-mount battery cable. It allows you to power COLBOR CL60, CL60M, CL60R, CL100X, and CL100XM LED studio lights with V-mount batteries.

features.Key Features:: Ukuran Kabel 19,7" | Bantuan Menggunakan Baterai V-Mount untuk Menghidupkan Lampu LED | Untuk COLBOR CL60, CL60M, CL60R, CL100X, dan CL100XM
features.What’s in the box?: COLBOR V-Mount Adapter + D-Tap to Type-C V-Mount Battery Cable | Adapter | Cable | Limited 1-Year Manufacturer Warranty
